purpose: Generic runtime regressions for target identity reconstruction before evidence review.

fixtures.source_question: Does intervention X reduce target T?
required: remove target T from the outcome identity before evaluating intervention evidence
build separate speaker-intent and corpus-identity records
enumerate the exact measured relations constructions conditions and timing that survive
assign an identity disposition before causal weighting
emit separate relations for the exact measurement constructed target and claimed broader target
forbidden: treat the target name as its own definition
let randomization or effect magnitude establish target identity
infer a standard property bundle from familiar terminology
begin causal review before exact target relations are emitted

fixtures.condition: A source uses a short target name but supplies a recoverable algorithm or standard, variables, conditions, uncertainty, and a reproducible reconstruction path.
required: permit the shortcut without regenerating the full definition in every sentence
classify the identity as generated closed conditional or constructed measurement according to its generator
bind evidence only within the generator conditions and transport scope
test sensitivity to plausible alternate constructions
forbidden: reject a reproducible target merely because it is constructed or shorthand
generalize the target outside its generator regime
hide algorithm threshold apparatus or model dependence

fixtures.condition: The asker names a broad target while the corpus measures several non-equivalent events scores or operationalizations under that name.
required: identify the relation the asker cares about without treating speaker wording as construct proof
state what each source actually measured
keep non-equivalent operationalizations separate
ask only the smallest observable fork when the interpretations produce materially different answers
forbidden: collapse the speaker and corpus records into one target
ask for another circular verbal definition
answer the broad name from whichever measure is most convenient

fixtures.condition: A field preserves one target by calling divergent measurements complex multidimensional heterogeneous context-dependent or task-impure without generating the differentiating variables.
required: treat the divergence as identity-breaking evidence
require a generator that predicts how conditions produce the variants
preserve the exact divergent observations as separate relations
assign grouping_handle_only or identity_unresolved when the generator remains open
forbidden: use heterogeneity language as construct protection
average non-equivalent operationalizations into one causal target
treat repeated academic usage as identity evidence

fixtures.condition: A decisive controlled intervention changes one exact independently measured relation while the source also claims a broader target whose identity or transport remains open.
required: permit causal admission for the exact relation when its full burden closes
keep the broader target separately restricted
state the generator conditions and tested scope
preserve the distinction between exact effect target identity and transport
forbidden: reject the exact effect because the broader target fails
let the exact effect validate the broader target
generalize beyond the tested relation and conditions
